summary.intent: Investigate why GitHub issue #631 (whisper.model and whisper.language config fields never worked) and implement a fix.
summary.outcome: Fixed both the WhisperStt struct (added language field, with_options constructor, language fallback in transcribe) and the gateway factory (wired config through to with_options). Added config template documentation for [voice.stt.whisper]. All tests pass.

repo: GroqStt is the canonical reference implementation for STT providers — struct holds model+language, with_options takes both, transcribe uses request.language.or_else(|| self.language.clone()).
The gateway factory (create_provider) rebuilds STT providers on every request via discover_and_load — wasteful but intentional at this time.
bd (beads) issue tracker is used: create issue before writing code, claim it, close on commit.
Commit convention: conventional commits format e.g. 'fix(voice): ...', no Co-Authored-By.
Pre-commit workflow: just format, just lint, just test — but just lint has a pre-existing CUDA/macOS failure unrelated to changes.
Config template (crates/config/src/template.rs) must be updated in the same PR as user-facing behavior changes per CLAUDE.md.

code.finding: WhisperStt was constructed with WhisperStt::new(Some(k)) — hardcoded model 'whisper-1', no language. Config was never passed through despite being loaded on every call.
WhisperStt struct only had client, api_key, model — no language field, making whisper.language a dead config key.
transcribe only used request.language; no fallback to a configured language even after fix to struct.
with_model constructor existed but was only used in unit tests (L242), never in production — dead production path.
Groq struct already had model+language fields; lines 67-77 show with_options, 129-131 show language fallback — used as template for Whisper fix.
VoiceWhisperConfig already had model and language fields defined — schema was correct, only the factory and provider struct were broken.

workflow: When just lint fails globally due to platform issues (CUDA/macOS), run targeted clippy on only the touched crates instead.
Filing a bd issue before writing code and claiming it is part of the standard contribution workflow in this repo.

friction: just lint has a pre-existing CUDA/macOS build failure that blocks global lint runs — requires targeted clippy workaround.
with_model existed as a partial solution but was misleadingly named and only wired to tests, not production, causing confusion about what was actually broken.
open_items: The create_provider pattern rebuilds STT providers on every request (via discover_and_load) — wasteful, noted as tech debt but out of scope for this fix.
with_model constructor is now redundant (only had test callers) — could be removed or made to delegate to with_options in a follow-up cleanup.
Verify docs/src/ voice page doesn't claim whisper model/language fields work or don't work — a quick grep was recommended but may not have been completed.
